faqs.question: Can College of Engineering, Muttathara be considered as a reputed Institute?
faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at College of Engineering, Muttathara are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, College of Engineering, Muttathara has a rating of 3.5 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.1, 3.7, 3.6 and 3.2 as per reviews by students.

faqs.answer: College of Engineering, Muttathara has been rated 3.7 on placements.

faqs.answer: College of Engineering, Muttathara courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by College of Engineering, Muttathara goes up to 360.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty and decent infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: My course is computer science and it is a software field it is related to coding, databases, DevOps, etc. It has lots of opportunities in the IT field. I am a proud member of the CSE batch from CEM, Trivandrum affiliated with KTU. The four-year B.Tech program is designed to provide us with solid technical knowledge in areas such as programming, data structures, DBMS, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The CSE department at CEM is equipped with essential infrastructure required for both academic and practical learning. The department has well-maintained computer lab with high-speed internet wired connection and necessary software tools for programming.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: B.Tech Computer Science Journey: CEM.

review_content.Placements: I only just joined the college. It's only been two-three months. The college administration tells us that around 60% of students who complete the B.Tech degree get placements in companies like Infosys, etc. Interviews and all start from the seventh semester, and the companies will inform you then if you've been chosen or not. The average package is around 15,000. The top package was something around 60,000 to 80,000. You don't really need to top in all subjects; even if you manage to pass all subjects, you might have a chance. Top roles offered in my course are Software Engineer, Data Scientist, Product Manager, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: In general the college is still developing. Not to give much hypes.

review_content.Placements: About 45–60% of students are getting placed from our institute. That's clearly an above-average number. The placement cell is actually doing a good job. But, to be honest, we get to know that the old placement cell have done a better job than the new placement cell. But can say that this placement cell is also doing well. The highest package offered is 5 LPA The lowest package offered is 3 LPA The avg package offered is 4 LPA It should be mentioned that the given packages are approximately. The real values will be very close to this. top recruiters that offer placement in our campus are Infosys and UST Global. Actually, our college doesn't give any internships. But can get access to internships outside. By means of other online platform. We can get internships to top companies like amazon, Google, etc. Top roles that is we can get to high roles in companies which is software development related. The roles offered maybe different depending o on our skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it’s a nice college. Please don't give much hype to the College.

review_content.Placements: About 60-70% of the students got placed. The salary packages and all depend upon the company that you are hiring. UST Global is the highest company that ever came. Frankly speaking, I didn't go for any one of the internships until now, so I don't know about that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There is a library in which all kinds of study material are available. There is no connection for Wi-Fi inside the campus. Classrooms are also neat and clean. There is no dedicated hostel for College. There is also a canteen which serves good food. If you are interested in sports events, you can represent them in KTU Zonal.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, but the atmosphere of the campus and the placement are the major issues.

review_content.Placements: The placement is available at the college, but it is mostly available for its field, which is basically computer science. The electrical and electronics engineering students don't have any sort of placement, even if they score great marks in the exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college, but the college management doesn't allow the students to use it. The labs and classes are equipped with recent machines. The library consists of several books, which are freely accessible to every student who studies in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Average college with low facilities.

review_content.Placements: The college offers average placement with an average LPA. Many small startup companies came for placement. 60% students get placement every year but the thing is they provide only low LPA. The highest package last year was 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in the hostel are average. Food is a little good as compared to other colleges. In a week, 4 days non-veg is served and 3 days veg is served. Sometime ago, there was a strike done by hostel students raising the problem about hostel's food and its taste.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department at CEM is equipped with essential infrastructure required for both academic and practical learning. The department has well-maintained computer lab with high-speed internet wired connection and necessary software tools for programming.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech Computer Science Journey: CEM.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good and very clean. The college is fully Wi-Fi networked. If you have a library pass, you can get the password for the Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also good, but some benches are a little damaged; overall, it's good. Every class is equipped with projectors, lights, and fans. They also have hostel facilities. I don't really know that much about the hostel because I'm a day-scholar, but I heard that food quality and rooms are good and clean. Every lab is equipped with AC except t...

reviews.review_heading: In general the college is still developing. Not to give much hypes.
reviews.review_text: The facilities given in the college are so average; yes, they give us access to Wi-Fi. But the Wi-Fi is really slow on every other side of the college, except for some. Lab facilities are quite below average, except for the computer science-related labs. Every other lab out there is just a simple setup. Actually, they are not very useful at all. Classrooms are good for getting enough space to fill the students. The light and fans are enough. But the classes don't get inbuilt projectors, which is...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it’s a nice college. Please don't give much hype to the College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There is a library in which all kinds of study material are available. There is no connection for Wi-Fi inside the campus. Classrooms are also neat and clean. There is no dedicated hostel for College. There is also a canteen which serves good food. If you are interested in sports events, you can represent them in KTU Zonal.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but the atmosphere of the campus and the placement are the major issues.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the college, but the college management doesn't allow the students to use it. The labs and classes are equipped with recent machines. The library consists of several books, which are freely accessible to every student who studies in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with low facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in the hostel are average. Food is a little good as compared to other colleges. In a week, 4 days non-veg is served and 3 days veg is served. Sometime ago, there was a strike done by hostel students raising the problem about hostel's food and its taste.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faculty members and much better placements.
reviews.review_text: The lab and Wi-Fi facilities are the best. All classrooms are high-tech and much better. The library is very large. Many books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: You can easily afford the college and the faculty members are helpful.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel on campus. We have to afford the hostel outside. But the classes are good. No Wi-Fi for students. Labs are limited, for labs, we need to go to another college in Pathanapuram. We have good faculty members. The library is there in the college for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Muttathara.
reviews.review_text: The college ambiance is bad. There is no playground, garden or even trees. It is a typical barren land. As our college is under the Ministry of Corporation, we have no shortage of funds. We have air-conditioned seminar halls, computer lab etc. All other necessary labs are available for the respective courses. The college doesn't have a hostel on the campus. But they provide hostel facilities for needy students who are from other districts. The college has a good canteen which provides food at af...

reviews.review_heading: It's easy to get admission in college of engineering, Muttathara if you qualify in KEAM exam.
reviews.review_text: Since airport is near, buildings or educational blocks contains only two floors. Labs, library and classrooms are good. College ground is too small.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life here is the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered are pretty good. Wi-Fi lab and library are satisfactory, and classrooms are very neat and good. A vast collection of books is available in the library, and students can keep books for up to one month. The atmosphere in the Wi-Fi lab is quite entertaining, and the library is calm.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Muttathara.
reviews.review_text: Our college is improving its infrastructure and facilities. Good quality food is available in the canteen at an affordable price. Sports and other games competitions are conducted outside the campus as there is no place inside the campus to conduct them. Most of the labs have the best equipment. Unfortunately, mechanical labs were not highly equipped during my studies.

reviews.review_heading: My campus experiences?
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very low compared to other Engineering colleges but they provide their best facilities to us. Wi-Fi facility is available for all areas in our campus and labs are average some equipment are not there may be it will come soon classroom are clean and good, library is also good. Quality of food is perfect. Medical facilities is okay their is a sick room is provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college for its enjoyment, but I am not impressed by the management.
reviews.review_text: Lab facilities are not completely available. Students are going to another college for practical classes and exams. There is no proper hostel facility. The canteen is not good. As the price is comparatively high, most of us prefer food from outside.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Laboratory was better. Sports activities were also conducted. Canteen was also available. Digital classrooms were available. Projectors were also provided in our classrooms.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

A:    R.V.S. College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MBA/PG

college_info.intro:
The University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University comprises 08 departments, including the Department of Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics & Statistics, Forensic Science, Geology, Home Science, Environmental Science, and Cosmetic. MGM SBAS offers various UG courses across the Basic & Applied Sciences stream through its departments.
The BSc programme is one of the most popular offerings at MGM SBAS. The University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences offers the BSc programme in six specialisations such as Physics, Chemistry, Geology, Home Science, Environmental Science, and Cosmetics. The popularity of the BSc programme at the University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences is attributed to its industry-centric curriculum developed in collaboration with companies such as Qspider, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Pooran Info Vision, Hexaware, Capgemini, Infosys, Intellipat, and Datapy, among others aimed at enhancing graduate employability. Below mentioned are some of the most popular MGM University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences courses, along with eligibility and selection criteria:

placements.overview: University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University placement 2025-2024 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance through a dedicated MGM SBAS placement cell. Further, the college assists students in resume building, interview preparation, etc. in the Basic & Applied Sciences field. Some past recruiters of the University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University Placements are Qspider, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Pooran Info Vision, Hexaware, Capgemini, Infosys, Intellipat, and Datapy, among others.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University has various departments, including the Department of Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and Statistics, Forensic Science, Geology, Home Science, Environmental Science, and Cosmetics. At the UG level, the university offers BSc and BTech courses. At the PG level, the institute offers MSc and MTech programmes offered by the students. Candidates can check the University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University courses and MGM SBAS fees details in the table provided below:

admission_process.title: University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University admission is entrance-based for its UG, PG, diploma, and PhD courses. The college conducts a university-level entrance exam, i.e.,MGMU CET, for admission to its courses. Admission to all the courses is ongoing atUniversity Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University. The college offers an online mode of application. Candidates looking for admission to any course are required to visit the official website ofMGM University. To know more about University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University admission 2025, go through the following section:

Candidates looking for admission to University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University must fill out the eligibility criteria for all the courses. The selection criteria for all the courses, such as BSc, BTech, MSc, UG-PG diploma, and PhD courses, are entrance-based. Candidates also need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria i.e., pass Class 12 with a good aggregate for admission to UG and UG diploma courses. For admission to PG and PG diploma courses, candidates must have passed a graduation degree. Check out the following table for details onUniversity Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University courseeligibility and selection criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
BSc in a relevant stream from a recognised university or institute
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board
Graduation from a recognised university/institute
Master's degree with 55% aggregate
Pass Class 10 and Class 12 with PCB from a recognised board

University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University, admission process 2025 is entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission to any courses must qualify for the respective entrance exams and other selection rounds, including applying online on the official website of MGM University. Check out the following steps for a detailed University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Candidates looking for admission to any UG, PG, diploma, PhD courses at University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University, must submit an online application form along with a registration fee of INR 1,500. The application form will not be accepted by the college without submitting the necessary documents.
Step 2: Selection Round

As part of the selection process, candidates are required to qualify for the MGMU CET entrance exam conducted by the university. After the selection rounds are completed, the college releases a list of shortlisted candidates based on their eligibility fulfilment and scores in the entrance exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates in the University Department of Basic and Applied Sciences, MGM University, are required to pay course fees within the given dates to lock their seats.

review_content.Placements: Our course is very easy if one is interested in it. Percentile required for our college is above 65%. Many top companies, such as Infosys, Wipro, etc., visit our college for recruitment. The highest salary package offered at our college is 15 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is beautiful. Our college has good building, grounds and many more things which upgrade students knowledge. Our college is best in sports.
review_content.Faculty: Our college teaching staff gives their best and puts in extra effort during lectures and examinations. They help students with any doubt. Before examination, our college held 2 sectional examinations for students to make their doubts clear. Every teacher helps students with a single doubt also. Staff is supportive and helps in every situation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good staff members and good natural beauty.

review_content.Placements: Both our college and staff members have good behaviour and excellent teaching service. From our class, about 25 students got placed out of 40 students in multinational companies and also national companies. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 16,000 per month. The highest salary is offered based on students skills, and it is Rs. 27,000 per month. Many companies visit our college like Amazon, Tristha, etc. Nearly about 21 students out of 38 students got internships in Trishta Global from our college, and some students were placed out of Maharashtra as well.

The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Venkateshwara Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Venkateshwara Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Venkateshwara Group of Institutions courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Venkateshwara Group of Institutions courses stands around INR 40,000 to 2,82,000.

Major specialisation at Venkateshwara Group of Institutions are Agriculture, Food Technology, Biotechnology, Biotechnology Engineering, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Only 50% of the students get placed in this course. The highest salary package in our course was about INR 9-10 LPA, the average salary is INR 5-6 LPA & the lowest salary package is INR 3.5-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies that take students from our college including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Sun Tech etc. College also provides training and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provides almost all the necessary facilities. It has a nice area, consisting of different labs for different courses, a library, well maintained classrooms and a ground. The environment of the college is good and filled with greenery, which gives a great and positive feeling.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Truba Institute of Engineering and Information Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Truba, where success begins.

content.Placements: The placement scene is not great; there are not many opportunities, and you are pretty much on your own. You have to work hard for your own sake and your family and earn some money on your own. Internships can be challenging, but we will make it out someday.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the hostel, so I don't know much about it, but the infrastructure of the classrooms is pretty good in a literal sense. My friend told me that the hostel environment is very good, and the food quality is also fine. They take care of the students very well, and I like it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Truba Institute of Engineering and Information Technology.

content.Placements: At this college, most of the students get placements in CSE. Almost 40-50% students get placements in our CSE branch. Top recruiting companies in our course were TCS, Netcracker, Infosys, GlobalLogic, etc. In our college, around 80% students get internships. Average package offered was 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of this course at our college was good. College was having good quality facilities on the campus for the students. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, etc. were the facilities available on the campus. Hostel rooms of the college were furnished. Food of the mess was good to eat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Business System - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good in studies.

content.Placements: Only 50% of the students get placed in this course. The highest salary package in our course was about INR 9-10 LPA, the average salary is INR 5-6 LPA & the lowest salary package is INR 3.5-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies that take students from our college including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Sun Tech etc. College also provides training and internships.
content.Infrastructure: College provides almost all the necessary facilities. It has a nice area, consisting of different labs for different courses, a library, well maintained classrooms and a ground. The environment of the college is good and filled with greenery, which gives a great and positive feeling.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements and studies are average in our college.

content.Placements: Placements are below average in our college. Around 30-40% of students got placed in our college. The average salary package offered is 3.7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, etc. The placement and training cell is decent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. Our library is excellent, and all books are available in it. Our classrooms are good. The computer and Wi-Fi are good. The food served in the canteen is very good and provides all food items. Our college is not active in games and sports. Medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college for students.

content.Placements: Placements of this college are more than average. We can get good placements if you are choosing this college. You will not be at loss, you can go for it; companies hire students. The highest package offered to students was 25 lacs per annum. The passing batch is satisfied with the college.
content.Infrastructure: It provides good facilities according to students, it always put forward the perspective students like good labs, classroom, library and comfortable facilities for students. In sports and games, it gives us good platform to students.

paragraphs: Truba Institute of Engineering and Information Technology admissions are based on merit. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: It provides good facilities according to students, it always put forward the perspective students like good labs, classroom, library and comfortable facilities for students. In sports and games, it gives us good platform to students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements with decent salary packages.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for labs is quite good. You will never have any issues there. All the computers are working fine and have the latest software. Labs are well maintained and air-conditioned. Classrooms are spacious with good furniture, and a few classes have smart boards as well. The library is one of the best places. The furniture is very good and well maintained, and it can accommodate around 80 to 120 students easily, but you will find only technical and subject-related books here. The cant...

reviews.review_heading: Truba is a good college to study and grow in.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs with lots of computers so that students can learn and can practice simultaneously. You can practice coding in a lab in your free time. There is a big library with many books you can take books home and return them after reading them and you also read books in the library. A hostel facility is also available. The room in the hostel is big and only 2 people live in one room. The 3-time meal is provided to students quality of food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with our college's growth.
reviews.review_text: The labs in our college are very well developed, and the infrastructure is also very good. The faculty of management in our college has provided a disciplined hostel life and good security for girls. Boys are also kept in mind by management. The food is good, according to all the members.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is old, but our college provides every small thing to a student in their life to make it easy, and they also upgrade our infrastructure day by day. The hostel is also good, there are separate buildings for boys and girls so, there will be no problem for them also the wardens are very good here.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and placements records.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as it acquires all facilities relevant to our course which includes big computer laboratories, smart classrooms, well-stocked libraries, full Wi-Fi connectivity. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is acceptable. The medical facilities are available for students and staff. Grounds and courts are available for many sports like badminton, basketball, football, cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers, decent placements and amazing campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent enough here or better than most other colleges. Classrooms are spacious and have proper ventilation, which is great. Ground area with basketball courts is also good. There is a hostel inside the campus, but I would not recommend it to other students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members as they are very supportive. It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good but not the best. Labs are good. It has a huge library. Classrooms are quite good in our college. The quality of the food served is better. It has a good canteen. It provides many games and sports facilities like badminton, football, basketball, volleyball, and many indoor games also.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Bhopal, with 65% of placements and amazing college life.
reviews.review_text: We have a building for Truba Institute of Engineering and Information Technology. We have two other buildings under Truba groups which are for pharmacy and science, and technology and commerce. We have a huge library with an ample number of recently published and updated books, journals and newspapers. We have computer labs, robotics lab, Physics lab, workshops, civil lab, mechanical lab, electronics lab and English communication lab. The college has tie-ups with many nearby hostels but lacks on...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with good quality. They encourage us to play mentally and physically.

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure and outdated facilities.
reviews.review_text: Although the infrastructure is good, there is need for some renovation. The labs need upgradation and the Wi-Fi does not cover the entire campus of the college. The library has many books but sometimes many books are unavailable due to unknown reasons.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is average, but the best thing is it is a central university.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30%-40% of the students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata Consultancy, Apollo Pharmacy, ONGC, NEEPCO, ICICI, Vodafone, Sun Pharma, Nestle and Axis Bank. Almost 90% of the students got an internship from our course in companies like IDBI Bank, ICICI Bank, TCS, HSBC Global Outsourcing, Stock Holding Corporation of India, Wipro BPO and Tata Motor Finance.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24x7 for all. There is a shortage of hostels for boys, and there is only a 60% chance of getting it. Else you can rent a house in the nearby area, i.e., Irongmara. Mess food is good, and it is not like other hostels. If you are vegetarian, separate food is made for you.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Mid range college with no placement.

review_content.Placements: No placement, there is no particular placement committee assigned for this process hence the jobs will be taken up by the students themselves who approach companies by themselves in order to get employed. Only a few companies visit the campus due to its remote location. All students have a mandatory subject assigned for the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi at reasonable speed. Library with few good subject related books. Medical facilities are poor. Sports and games equipment are available at demand only. There is annual sports meet conducted in the university hence prior to that interested students are required to ask the sports committee for the equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The faculty members are the worst and no co-operation. Threatens students of putting backlogs on the exams. Plays with the students' career. Don't allow to celebrate tech-fest. If ask about it, they make them fails, threatens to destroy their career. Teaching is very bad. Partiality everywhere. Placement is near to negligible. Only 2-3 students are placed among around 44 students of the batch 2011-15. Before that no placements were there. The next batch placement is also same. Worst decision taken by me in my life about studying there. Politics everywhere. Will suggest not to go there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is average, but the best thing is it is a central university.

content.Placements: Almost 30%-40% of the students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata Consultancy, Apollo Pharmacy, ONGC, NEEPCO, ICICI, Vodafone, Sun Pharma, Nestle and Axis Bank. Almost 90% of the students got an internship from our course in companies like IDBI Bank, ICICI Bank, TCS, HSBC Global Outsourcing, Stock Holding Corporation of India, Wipro BPO and Tata Motor Finance.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24x7 for all. There is a shortage of hostels for boys, and there is only a 60% chance of getting it. Else you can rent a house in the nearby area, i.e., Irongmara. Mess food is good, and it is not like other hostels. If you are vegetarian, separate food is made for you.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Mid range college with no placement.

content.Placements: No placement, there is no particular placement committee assigned for this process hence the jobs will be taken up by the students themselves who approach companies by themselves in order to get employed. Only a few companies visit the campus due to its remote location. All students have a mandatory subject assigned for the internship.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi at reasonable speed. Library with few good subject related books. Medical facilities are poor. Sports and games equipment are available at demand only. There is annual sports meet conducted in the university hence prior to that interested students are required to ask the sports committee for the equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015

content.Other: The faculty members are the worst and no co-operation. Threatens students of putting backlogs on the exams. Plays with the students' career. Don't allow to celebrate tech-fest. If ask about it, they make them fails, threatens to destroy their career. Teaching is very bad. Partiality everywhere. Placement is near to negligible. Only 2-3 students are placed among around 44 students of the batch 2011-15. Before that no placements were there. The next batch placement is also same. Worst decision taken by me in my life about studying there. Politics everywhere. Will suggest not to go there.

admission_process.title: SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone Admission process 2025

paragraphs: SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admissionto courses is entrance-based. Candidates willing to secure admission at SAGE University are required to meet the minimum eligibility and criteria and then appear in the selection process determined by the University. Candidates who perform well in all the selection rounds are allotted seats atSAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone.

SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone offersthree courses at UG and PG levelsin the field ofManagementandTechnologyand they are approved by AICTE. SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission is entirely based on candidates' past academic merit and performance inSunstone Screening ( Test & Interview). However, for admission to MBA, a valid score of either CAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ ATMA entrance exam is accepted.

Candidates seeking admission to SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone are required to meet the eligibility criteria before applying to their desired course. Check below the course-wise details for SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone course admission 2025:
Download:SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone Brochure 2025

The SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission process is a three-step process that begins with the release of application forms on the official website of the university and ends with the payment of the admission confirmation fee by the candidates. Candidates who meet the course-specific eligibility criteria refer to the detailed SAGE University, Bhopal Powered by Sunstone admission process below:
Step 1: Application Process
Candidates need to apply on the official website of Sunstone at(sunstone.in/campuses/sage-bhopal) for the preferred course.
Step 2: Selection process

Applicants are required to appear for the aptitude test conducted by SAGE University to shortlist candidates for the next round. Candidates applying to the MBA course can also appear forCAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ ATMAinstead of the aptitude test. In the next round, shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview.
Step 3:Admission offer
Candidates who perform well in both rounds are required to appear for the document verification. Based on the authenticity of their documents, applicants are selected and allotment of seats is done.

placement_data.title: SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SAGE University Bhopal powered by Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) gives students access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities , or they can get a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements don’t fulfill the promise. To qualify for POP, students need to keep a minimum average attendance of 70% in all their credit and non-credit classes each semester. They also have to pass all exams with at least an 80% score or the equivalent CGPA, and they shouldn’t have any backlogs. Moreover, students must make sure that all fee payments are done according to the schedule mentioned in the offer letter. Finally, students are expected to follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.

As per the latest report, the University hosted a panel of over 1,200 recruiters during the 2025 placements. More than 150 job profiles were offered. The highest package offered during SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA , and the average package stood at INR 4.60 LPA .

The placement team of SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone keeps track of the dynamic changes taking place across the globe to ensure success with Sunstone’s placement-centric sessions, such as comprehensive interview preparation. The course curriculum of courses like MBA , BBA , and BTech includes an 8-month internship project that helps students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. Alongside this, 100% of scholarship opportunities are offered to the students.

placement_data.complete_content:
SAGE University Bhopal powered by Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) gives students access to over
200 guaranteed placement opportunities
, or they can get a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements don’t fulfill the promise. To qualify for POP, students need to keep a minimum average attendance of 70% in all their credit and non-credit classes each semester. They also have to pass all exams with at least an 80% score or the equivalent CGPA, and they shouldn’t have any backlogs. Moreover, students must make sure that all fee payments are done according to the schedule mentioned in the offer letter. Finally, students are expected to follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.
As per the latest report, the University hosted a panel of over
1,200 recruiters
during the 2025 placements. More than
150 job profiles
were offered. The
highest package
offered during SAGE University Bhopal Powered by Sunstone placements 2025 was
INR 26 LPA
, and the
average package
stood at
INR 4.60 LPA
.

MBA
,
BBA
, and
BTech
includes an
8-month internship project
that helps students learn the key concepts with a practical approach. Alongside this,
100% of scholarship opportunities
are offered to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology - PABCET is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. reviews_list.review_title: Utmost dissatisfaction due to the college's inability to do nothing for students growth.

review_content.Placements: The College has no placements were made, and not even a single company visited our college for the campus interview. There is no placement cell active in this college. Not even a single person from my college have attended interview through placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are not well-maintained. The library is the worst. Over the Lab, most of the experiments were incomplete due to the absence of the machines and relevant tools or equipment. The canteen is average. The hostel is the worst, and the food provided to the hostellers is average. Rooms for the hostel residents were badly-maintained.

review_summary.college_name: Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology - PABCET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided in our college because of the pandemic. They are going to be held this year in our college. Some well-known companies visited our college to recruit our seniors. They offered a salary of Rs. 12,000 per month. Those companies offered team-employee and service-based roles.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are enough for this academic year. If the number of students increases, classrooms are not sufficient. The laboratory is the most comfortable place in the entire college. The hostel is not enough. The food served in the mess is average. The library is well-facilitated. It is enough for the entire college. A playground is enough for students. They won't conduct sports meetings.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology - PABCET.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. Many top recruiting MNCs visit our college like Tech Mahendra, etc. More than 50% of students got internships in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Our campus is peaceful, and it is has many trees. There is a huge library. Our college provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals for students. Free Wi-Fi is available on our campus. The food served in the canteen is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Utmost dissatisfaction due to the college's inability to do nothing for students growth.

content.Placements: The College has no placements were made, and not even a single company visited our college for the campus interview. There is no placement cell active in this college. Not even a single person from my college have attended interview through placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are not well-maintained. The library is the worst. Over the Lab, most of the experiments were incomplete due to the absence of the machines and relevant tools or equipment. The canteen is average. The hostel is the worst, and the food provided to the hostellers is average. Rooms for the hostel residents were badly-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2012

content.Other: Very bad administration, they only focus for money. Staffs are good and experienced. Practically we can’t learn anything, very worst administration. They debit fine even it’s a small matter. No placements facilities. They have conducted off campus drive and cheated. They even charged money from us for the same. They also cheated us regarding scholarship as well. I never recommend this college because I don't want to spoil your life.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This college is quite good in terms of managment functioning.

content.Placements: This college offers an employee a base salary of Rs 10,000 and placement is not good. Now I am out and working for another company with Rs15000, and I am also searching for a job for my best future. College plays no role in students' futures and placement.
content.Infrastructure: Each and every department block is damaged and it is all in a serious condition of falling down. In a lab with a large number of defected computer systems, only a few systems are usable. The hostel can accommodate only 100 students. Students should leave the hostel after the fourth semester. The college also provides a mess. Foods are not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are enough for this academic year. If the number of students increases, classrooms are not sufficient. The laboratory is the most comfortable place in the entire college. The hostel is not enough. The food served in the mess is average. The library is well-facilitated. It is enough for the entire college. A playground is enough for students. They won't conduct sports meetings.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pavendar Bharathidasan College of Engineering and Technology - PABCET.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Our campus is peaceful, and it is has many trees. There is a huge library. Our college provides both vegetarian and non-vegetarian meals for students. Free Wi-Fi is available on our campus. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Utmost dissatisfaction due to the college's inability to do nothing for students growth.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are not well-maintained. The library is the worst. Over the Lab, most of the experiments were incomplete due to the absence of the machines and relevant tools or equipment. The canteen is average. The hostel is the worst, and the food provided to the hostellers is average. Rooms for the hostel residents were badly-maintained.

Very bad administration, they only focus for money. Staffs are good and experienced. Practically we can’t learn anything, very worst administration. They debit fine even it’s a small matter. No placements facilities. They have conducted off campus drive and cheated. They even charged money from us for the same. They also cheated us regarding scholarship as well. I never recommend this college because I don't want to spoil your life. Very bad administration, they only focus for money. Staffs are good and experienced. Practically we can’t learn anything, very worst administration. They debit fine even it’s a small matter. No placements facilities. They have conducted off campus drive and cheated. They even charged money from us for the same. They also cheated us regarding scholarship as well. I never recommend this college because I don't want to spoil your life.

reviews.review_heading: This college is quite good in terms of managment functioning.
reviews.review_text: Each and every department block is damaged and it is all in a serious condition of falling down. In a lab with a large number of defected computer systems, only a few systems are usable. The hostel can accommodate only 100 students. Students should leave the hostel after the fourth semester. The college also provides a mess. Foods are not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2016 really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not maintained properly Wi-Fi is not available library is not used mess foods are no prepare well, no medical facilities sports are not good and no students get a win in sports no sports player in my college even not a first aid kit is not available in my college.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a very strict college.

review_content.Placements: Only 40% of students who placed in our course are very talented. The highest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month, the lowest is Rs. 10,000 per month, and the average is Rs. 18,000 per month. There are no top recruiting companies. About 25% of students got internships from our course at average companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computers in our labs have only 2 GB RAM. Wi-Fi is only available to faculty. Classrooms are fine but do not have whiteboards. Hostel rooms, mess, and canteen are good. reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students did not get placements. They conduct campus interviews for the name.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything was available in this college. The laboratory mark was based on internal and academic marks for each person. There were morning and evening tests. It was like school. I would not recommend students to join this college.
review_content.Other: I opted for this course, because my sister recommend me this course. Our college life was not good, because it conducts morning and evening tests and re-tests as well. Bus facilities to different places such as Hour, Oothangarai, Pochampalli, Dharmapuri, Veppanapalli, and Tirupattur, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: The review of P.S.V. College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not that bad. The college gives much importance to the education. We have high-tech lab facilities, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available here. Classrooms are excellent, and the classroom atmosphere is good. The college also has a library, and the canteen is good here. Hostel rooms are good here. Students are restricted to use mobile phones on the campus. However, the medical facilities provided here are good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and staff are excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are good. The hostel is average, and the mess food is of good quality. The canteen, sports, and games are also nice. Medical facilities are excellent and supportive of students’ health.

reviews.review_heading: Jy college has good infrastructure and talented faculties
reviews.review_text:
My college has good infrastructure and talented staffs.... it was a good place for education and discipline...every department has separate laboratory with wifi facilities and libraries 
All type of facilities are available in my college 
24hrs medical facilities and food was really good like home foods...canteen was also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a neat and decent college. There is nothing special, but it's okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best. The hostel is not in good condition, but it's okay. The food is the worst, and they give us some free food. There is no coaching for hostel students. There is no Wi-Fi. It has the best classrooms and a good library. The canteen is okay. Medical facilities are the best. Sports are developing. There are no games.

overview_faqs.question: Is College of Engineering, Kidangoor a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: College of Engineering, Kidangoor is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, College of Engineering, Kidangoor has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 4 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Nearly 30% of the students got placed in high firms. The remaining students preferred higher studies or went to create start-up businesses. Top recruiting company is Wipro. They are offered roles in leading positions in their respective firms with high income.
content.Infrastructure: College of Engineering, Kidangoor Idangoor has everything a student needs, from well-equipped labs, a library containing more than 9,000 books, hostels, and a clean canteen. There are good sports facilities, a co-op store for essentials, and even a language lab. Overall, the campus provides a great environment for learning and growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: You could enjoy your campus life here, but if you are into placement prefer another.

content.Placements: You get enough placement opportunities, one must be skilled by 3rd year so that the process of placement ease and one get the desired company, many of us get tester and developer roles and some of them get really good jobs, it depends on the skill level.
content.Infrastructure: Library facility are provided till 4:00 PM. Classrooms are averagely maintained, and faculty members are good. Ladies' hostel is inside the college, and many PGs are there for boys with decent food and accommodation, on average the rate would come nearly around Rs. 6,000 with all food and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College of Engineering, Kidangoor Idangoor has everything a student needs, from well-equipped labs, a library containing more than 9,000 books, hostels, and a clean canteen. There are good sports facilities, a co-op store for essentials, and even a language lab. Overall, the campus provides a great environment for learning and growth.

reviews.review_heading: You could enjoy your campus life here, but if you are into placement prefer another.
reviews.review_text: Library facility are provided till 4:00 PM. Classrooms are averagely maintained, and faculty members are good. Ladies' hostel is inside the college, and many PGs are there for boys with decent food and accommodation, on average the rate would come nearly around Rs. 6,000 with all food and accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Kidangoor.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are average; rooms offer only average amenities. However, the ambiance with friends differs compared to other college hostels. Our hostel food is pretty good and somewhat tasty, but sometimes it becomes too boring, leading to many problems raised by students about the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for each department. The labs are mostly clean and very well equipped. Classrooms are big enough with enough benches and desks. The department library is small but has enough books. The college library is big enough to have many books. The hostel is good, with good food and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Decent Infrastructure. Good faculty. Incredible Community. Average Placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college, the College of Engineering in Kidangoor, lacks a hostel, but that shouldn't be a matter of concern as there are plenty of private hostels and paying guest facilities available nearby the college. The college does have a women's hostel. The canteen facility at the college is top-notch, with affordable food items for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Yes, most infrastructure is available. Wi-Fi is available freely for everyone. Labs are good with proper computers. Facilities are good. Classrooms contain enough benches and desks. The library is big, with so many books. There is only a ladies hostel provided by college management.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, good placements and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Pretty good infrastructure. There are enough benches and desks in each classroom. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good with enough computers. Library many books. Library is also available. Hostel is very good. TV is available. Also newspapers is provided. Good food and good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College on the hilltop, and ranking 2nd place in Kottayam.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure with enough lab facilities and its own girls hostel, canteen, other facilities, sports room, and big auditorium for program conducting are there. The CGPC hall and ASAP room are air-conditioned, and we'll maintain the CAD labs and computer labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and green campus. Qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for all departments. Developed laboratory are there. There are four labs in Computer Science and engineering department only. Hostels are good. Better facilities are here. Computerized library is working with 1000s of books. For boys canteen food is available .

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, average infrastructure and facility.
reviews.review_text: Computer Science Department is better in infrastructure compared to all other departments. There are total of 6 lecture halls and two labs. Wi-Fi is available. College hostel is only provided for ladies. The hostel is clean and neat. The food is also good. Its been only 2 years since college hostel opened. So there is no so much facilities. Students are free to watch TV and play table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not good, but it is well-equipped with basic requirements. Labs are available. Classrooms are spacious. Many books are available in the library. There are advanced computer facilities. There are separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Really good and satisfied, with the infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms offer an environment for studying. Co-curricular activities are taken into consideration by the authorities. Wi-Fi is provided in each department. Labs focus on the student skills. College library and department library, provide a lot of study materials and novels. Ladies hostel is very strict. After 6, nobody is allowed to get out of the hostel. The hostel is inside the campus. It provides full security.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Kidangoor.
reviews.review_text: Our department is well facilitated with Wi-Fi, laboratories, and a library. Our classrooms are spacious. The department library is accessible to students, and several books are available there. The hostel facilities are good, and the food quality is average. Sports and games are encouraged by staff members. Adequate medical facilities are provided. The food served in the canteen is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus life is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. Our campus ambiance is also decent. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and laboratories are perfect. Hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Not what you are looking for.
reviews.review_text: There is no college hostel for boys and girls. The girl's hostel is under construction and will be opened soon. Currently, the hostel is provided by private persons which are controlled by the college and PTA. Some of the private owners provide quality food at a low cost but it is not so good for all the private hostels.

admission_process.title: CSET Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CSET Kolkata admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The school considers scores in WBJEE, JEXPO, etc. for admission to specific programmes.Camellia School of Engineering and Technologyoffers UG, PG and diploma courses in affiliation withMAKAUTand WBSCTE. The school offers AICTE-approved courses such as BTech, MTech and diploma in the Engineering stream. Interested candidates can fill out the form available on the CSET's website.

The school offers programmes in full-time mode. Candidates need to pass the accepted entrance exam and also meet the academic requirements for admission. Below areCSET Kolkata coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
CSET admissions are currently open. Aspirants must first fill out the form to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in the school:
Step 1: CSET Kolkata Application Process 2025
Aspirants must first apply on the school's website for the preferred programme. Candidates need to provide the basic details in the form.
Step 2: Selection

CSET shortlists candidates for BTech based on WBJEE score. Admission to diploma programmes is based on JEXPO scores. Besides, the school also evaluates the application forms of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The school confirms the aspirants about their selection via email or SMS. Shortlisted aspirants need to pay theCSET Kolkata feeto confirm their seats in the school.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,36,940 to 3,86,296.

faqs.answer: A:    Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Industrial Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC is up to 288. Good thing to know is that Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC for all courses combined?

review_content.General: MMEC has a vast campus located on the NH-4, recently a new building has come up that includes the main administrative office that is visually appealing as well as spacious to accommodate and get the work done. The same building has got a huge library, as well as the auditorium(under construction). The other buildings have the spacious classrooms, toilets, and the staff rooms. MMEC has a huge boys hostel and staff quarters. They have a cafeteria and a mess. Even an open auditorium is coming up in the campus. There is a huge ground for football and a basketball court. There is a big garden, mangroves, and more open space, where many more infrastructure can come up within MMEC when required.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Overall the college is the best, but only if you want studies and to gain knowledge.

review_content.Placements: The on-campus placements are poor, but our seniors have been placed successfully in various heavy industries located in the Kolhapur-Hubli Industrial Corridor(means less number ME-oriented companies visit the college). But, the CS and ECE-oriented companies visit on a regular basis and also offer an adequate amount of salaries/packages, which are good according to the region. Recently, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant etc visited the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has 3 individual buildings. One is a recently constructed office building which houses a library, a college office, a gym(to come up) along with a cafeteria. The other buildings are an ECE-CSE combined building and ME and applied science. The ECE building houses a games room along with a seminar hall with a 150-students capacity. All the laboratories are equipped with the latest apparatus/computers, equipment etc. The campus has a vast playground for cricket/hockey and football, and a separate ground for basketball and volleyball. There are two hostels of UG and PG each, where the PG hostel is well-furnished than the UG one and is also housing a medical room. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled(whereas the hostel Wi-Fi connections work only from 5:00 PM-9:00 AM). Mechanical workshops are separately available in another building.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college is good in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: There were good placements in our college. Last time, 150 students got placements from our college. There were some local companies that arrives for the campus, and it was better. I love to attend campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was better, but nowadays there was no use of Wi-Fi as there was a jio network. Laboratories were good, but students love the laboratory, but the library was not good. There were doing a digital library.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were good, they were friendly with students. They help students in every step. They use digital to teach students by seeing some important informational videos. The student gets an idea about studies, and the teachers were very helpful.

As per Shiksha verified reviews, Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 4.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Maratha Mandal Engineering College - MMEC Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing college, and it provides every opportunity.

content.Placements: It is a good college, and my experience is good. The college assures placements. The college encourages students to work and study. Companies like Infosys and HP will recruit computer science and mechanical engineering students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good as everything is available here. The college provides facilities like water, playground and garden. Classrooms and library are good. The accommodation facility is good. There are a canteen and mess which are essential for a college. The college is next to the highway. Overall, the college has a good infrastructure and all practical labs like a chemistry lab, computer lab, physics lab and electronics lab.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The best college to get the experience of life, which once passed will never be get back.

content.Placements: Till 2016, a few placements were happening from the college, but from 2017, the students are offered the good job opportunities and exposure to today's professional world by providing the internships and the industrial visits. The coming years in MMEC will be prosperous and glorify to the students.
content.Infrastructure: MMEC has a vast campus located on the NH-4, recently a new building has come up that includes the main administrative office that is visually appealing as well as spacious to accommodate and get the work done. The same building has got a huge library, as well as the auditorium(under construction). The other buildings have the spacious classrooms, toilets, and the staff rooms. MMEC has a huge boys hostel and staff quarters. They have a cafeteria and a mess. Even an open auditorium is coming up in the campus. There is a huge ground for football and a basketball court. There is a big garden, mangroves, and more open space, where many more infrastructure can come up within MMEC when required.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is the best, but only if you want studies and to gain knowledge.

content.Placements: The on-campus placements are poor, but our seniors have been placed successfully in various heavy industries located in the Kolhapur-Hubli Industrial Corridor(means less number ME-oriented companies visit the college). But, the CS and ECE-oriented companies visit on a regular basis and also offer an adequate amount of salaries/packages, which are good according to the region. Recently, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant etc visited the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has 3 individual buildings. One is a recently constructed office building which houses a library, a college office, a gym(to come up) along with a cafeteria. The other buildings are an ECE-CSE combined building and ME and applied science. The ECE building houses a games room along with a seminar hall with a 150-students capacity. All the laboratories are equipped with the latest apparatus/computers, equipment etc. The campus has a vast playground for cricket/hockey and football, and a separate ground for basketball and volleyball. There are two hostels of UG and PG each, where the PG hostel is well-furnished than the UG one and is also housing a medical room. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled(whereas the hostel Wi-Fi connections work only from 5:00 PM-9:00 AM). Mechanical workshops are separately available in another building.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: There were good placements in our college. Last time, 150 students got placements from our college. There were some local companies that arrives for the campus, and it was better. I love to attend campus.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was better, but nowadays there was no use of Wi-Fi as there was a jio network. Laboratories were good, but students love the laboratory, but the library was not good. There were doing a digital library.
content.Faculty: Teachers were good, they were friendly with students. They help students in every step. They use digital to teach students by seeing some important informational videos. The student gets an idea about studies, and the teachers were very helpful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Yes, any body can join this college.

content.Placements: Good..! this year 4 members were selected from auto mobile engineering department 20% of students were placing. 20000 to 30000 offers. Wipro, Tata motors, aqus, shantala industry, siemens, infosys, etc. are the companies visited. We must do better studies for knowledge and placements.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, labs are good, classrooms are having good infrastructure, medical facility is available, no more sports available, good quality food and canteen available, hostel is good total maintenance is good best of luck for the students who join.

placements.overview: Gondwana University Maharashtra extends placement assistance in its campus. The university has not released the 2025 and 2024 placement details. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 15 PG (2-year) students were placed during Gondwana University placements 2022. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students was INR 1.80 LPA.

faqs.answer: A:    The placement record of Gondwana University is decent. According to the NIRF report 2023, 65% of PG (2 years) students were placed in the 2022 placement season. The median package offered was INR 1.80 LPA.Here are some of the companies that have visited Gondwana University for placements in recent years* TCS* Infosys* Wipro* Mahindra* Adani Power* Ballarshah Paper Industry
faqs.question: Is Gondwana University good for placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The official placement report is yet to be released. However, the University has released the NIRF report 2023 which incorporates the 2022 placement data for PG (2-year) courses. faqs.answer: A:    Out of 241 PG (2-year) graduates 15 were placed during the 2022 drive. There are no past-year placement records available for comparison. faqs.question: How many students were placed during Gondwana University placements?

faqs.answer: A:    MAH CET Cut off 2022 was 99.98 percentile for JBIMS,  99.95 percentile for Sydenham,  99.68 for S.I.E.S College,  99.67 for PUMBA Pune,  99.62 for XIMR. MAH MBA CET Cut Off is released by Maharashtra State Category wise fro admission to al MBA colleges in Maharashtra. The two categories that is accepeted by MAH MBA CET is the Maharashtra State Category and All India Category. Apart from these, Gondwana University, Gadchiroli also accepts state-level entrance exams such as MAH MBA CET, MHT CET, MHCET Law, and MAHCET. MAH MBA CET stands for Maharashtra Master of Business Administration Common Entrance Test, and it is conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Maharashtra, for admission to Master of Business Administration (MBA) programs in Maharashtra.
faqs.question: Can I get Gondwana University, MBA with 88% in MAH CET?

faqs.answer: A:    Gondwana University may provide direct admission to second year of a few programme. However, the regular admission is entrance or merit-based. The university considers entrance exams such as MAH CET, MHT CET, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in counselling and seat allotment round for final admission.
faqs.question: Can I join Gondwana University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Gondwana University fee includes various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
