reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty is good and helpful.

review_content.Placements: I am a 2025 batch passout but we have not placed yet. Poor placements are here. Only 2 to 3 organisations come but not for the main IT role, need to step up by yourself. Its not a big college, so you cant expect much from them either but got 1 internship from a connection of the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay not like good. College provide 2 labs, 1 with working computers but low Wi-Fi latency and the other with non working computers but great Wi-Fi latency. College have water filters, a canteen, a small ground, a event hall, and events.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued - (Oct-25) B.Com (Hons) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 80%. This course saves your money as it has low fee. Highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top companies recruit students here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained for us. Bike parking, car parking, Wi-Fi, lab, and classrooms are provided to monitor high performance and are connecting the campus. Mess quality and canteen are good.

review_summary.college_name: Gondwana University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Poor faculty despite good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many students in my class, about 60% of the students, are placed so far. The highest package last seen in 2014 was about 14.5 LPA, and the average, the lowest, is about 4 LPA. Wipro, Microsoft, and L&T are the top recruiting companies in my college. Almost all of the students got internships in companies like Nvidia Graphics, Oracle, etc. Data Analyst, Data Scientist, Full Stack Developer and Tester are the top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs provided by the college for each department, and there are regular maintenance calls for device care. There are smartboards available in each class for quality education, and each department has a separate block/building for research purposes. The library was renovated last year, and it has an extended variety of books. In the hostel, each room is provided with good electricity. There is a water shortage, and there are common bathrooms, so this is a bit uncomfortable for most of the students. The food quality is also low in the hostel, and there is almost no maintenance for the food in the hostel mess.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are satisfied with the good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placements. The college organise an internship programme that's good and well-offered.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, labs are okay, there is no Wi-Fi, and the hostel facility is not good. The college organizes sports and games. The canteen is average.
content.Faculty: Good teachers, qualified teaching staff, and knowledgeable. The quality is good. The difficulty level in semester exams at the college is good, and the passing percentage is good. I don't know about the exact pass percentage.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good and helpful.

content.Placements: I am a 2025 batch passout but we have not placed yet. Poor placements are here. Only 2 to 3 organisations come but not for the main IT role, need to step up by yourself. Its not a big college, so you cant expect much from them either but got 1 internship from a connection of the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay not like good. College provide 2 labs, 1 with working computers but low Wi-Fi latency and the other with non working computers but great Wi-Fi latency. College have water filters, a canteen, a small ground, a event hall, and events.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued - (Oct-25) B.Com (Hons) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is 80%. This course saves your money as it has low fee. Highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top companies recruit students here.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained for us. Bike parking, car parking, Wi-Fi, lab, and classrooms are provided to monitor high performance and are connecting the campus. Mess quality and canteen are good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is also good. Course is the best for student to get well placed by the university placements. Curriculum is relevant and makes students industry-ready completely.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.

content.Placements: College placements are good in the current situation. A number of companies visit the college, and students are capable of getting placed. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the average is 4.5 LPA. The main role in my course is Automation Engineer in the field of instrumentation engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very good. A number of departments are present, and their facilities are excellent. Classrooms are clean and under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Gondwana University?
faqs.answer: Around 70% of the students got placed through Gondwana University placements. Internship opportunities are also provided to students. Companies like Infosys, Cognizant, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, etc., visited the campus with a higher package of INR 10 LPA and an average package of INR 4 LPA. Its Placement Cell helps students attain jobs after completing their respective courses. The objective of the college is to provide industrial exposure in the respective field the student chooses to pursue after graduation. The students of Gondwana University get internships in different companies like ICICI, Axis, ACC cement, etc. The top roles offered were in the field of Sales, Marketing, etc. The highest stipend offered was around INR 25,000 per month, and the average stipend was INR 10,000 per month.

The library was renovated last year, and it has an extended variety of books. In the hostel, each room is provided with good electricity. There is a water shortage, and there are common bathrooms, so this is a bit uncomfortable for most of t...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Nevjabai Hitkarini CollegeReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are satisfied with the good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, labs are okay, there is no Wi-Fi, and the hostel facility is not good. The college organizes sports and games. The canteen is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Gyanodaya B.Ed and D.Ed CollegeReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay not like good. College provide 2 labs, 1 with working computers but low Wi-Fi latency and the other with non working computers but great Wi-Fi latency. College have water filters, a canteen, a small ground, a event hall, and events.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained for us. Bike parking, car parking, Wi-Fi, lab, and classrooms are provided to monitor high performance and are connecting the campus. Mess quality and canteen are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good. A number of departments are present, and their facilities are excellent. Classrooms are clean and under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements from last year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good, but Wi-Fi is available in all departments and the library. Students can use the college library till 9 PM for their studies. The hostel is nice compared to other government colleges. The mess is not provided by the college. We need to pay for it separately.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has experienced faculty and a decent college life.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the required facilities like Wi-Fi and a hostel. It mainly provides 6 branches. Based on my experience, the core branches have an upper hand in this college. The college has Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Instrumentation, and Civil branches.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 2 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college story with my experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 4 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about my college and see what I've shared.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 19 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ballarpur Institute of Technology (BIT Maharashtra)
reviews.review_heading: Good decent college around the area.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are average. The classrooms and labs are decent, and the Wi-Fi is good. The library is above average. The quality of everything in the college is decent, but the hostel is below average. The canteen is great, and the food is great. The food for hostelers is very basic, not good nor bad. The sports facilities are also average, but there are very few events in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 12 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college has poor infrastructure development. It doesn't have a proper road and old building.
reviews.review_text: We had a departmental library in our department building, which provides all the data that is required of us. Each room has a Wi-Fi facility and has a projector place inside. Hostel rooms are very good; each room can consist of 2 students, and all-year students can live in a hostel with a capacity of 200 students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 27 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college for middle-class students .
reviews.review_text: There is no WiFi in college. The library is good. Teachers are very good. The hostel needs to be renovated. And the playground is good; it's a huge one. We can play 3 to 4 sports at a time. The environment is good, surrounded by numerous plants.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 30 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: No Placements and Average Teaching .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

college_info.college_name: LUVAS Hisar: Courses, Admission 2025, Fees, Eligibility, Faculty

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences ranks #34 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

college_info.intro: LUVAS offers courses at the UG, PG, and PhD levels, along with Diploma courses. The popular programmes at LUVAS Hisar include B.E./ B.Tech and BVSC.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences courses are offered to students mainly in the field of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry, and Dairy Technology. The university offers UG, PG, and PhD courses, along with diploma courses. Further, the LUVAS courses are offered to students in full-time mode and are approved by the Veterinary Council of India (VCI).

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a well-experienced teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is good, with some of our seniors running their successful clinics and hospitals. The internship is done in various institutions and places all over India. Regular clinical exposure is experienced by us students, which helps a lot.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are decent with optimal lighting, air conditioners, and fans. Spacious cupboards are provided and each student gets their individual chair and table. The quality of mess food is also good with a variety in the menu available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A good college for veterinarians in India and has really good clinical infrastructure and teachers.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario at our college is just average. This year, 3–4 pass-out students from BVSC got placement in foreign countries like Australia, New Zealand and Mauritius. The placement depends more on the clinical knowledge of the student than on their CGPA. So overall, if you're good in clinics during your internship, you'll get placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are very well-equipped and the hospital is also the main government animal hospital in Haryana, so cases from the nearby districts come regularly, so the students get a lot of practical exposure. The Nehru Library is also one of the best in the state and has a collection of over 40,000 books. The hostel facility is something that needs to be improved. The hostel buildings are very old but you can easily get PG outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2026

review_summary.college_name: LUVAS Hisar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Veterinary and Animal Sciences - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college in our local area that connects humans to animals.

content.Placements: There are 60 seats in our college. Generally, there is no regular package for students. Some medical companies hire the students, but very few local companies do. Above 60 percent of students got internships. Best for educational purposes or practical work. Overall good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and quality of the buildings are very good. Many good facilities like Wi-Fi, hostel room facilities, digital classrooms, practical medicine lab, a big dairy farm, a good playground, etc., are available. Library facilities for students. Good water facility and washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Help the helpless animals.

content.Placements: In our course, placements are not there, but we have a B. Tech in dairy technology, where placement is 100%. The B. Tech batch of 25 students all get a job by placements with a handsome package of about 5-8 LPA. An internship program is there in our course for 1 year, and it is only for veterinary graduate students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good as our hostels are government-hosted, so the fee is very low, around Rs.7,000-Rs.10,000 per year, and electricity and water are free. The mess is run by the students itself so the food is also good. The hostel has free Wi-Fi and a 24/7 canteen. There is a volleyball ground, a cricket ground, and a common room for indoor games in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has a well-experienced teaching faculty.

content.Placements: The placement rate is good, with some of our seniors running their successful clinics and hospitals. The internship is done in various institutions and places all over India. Regular clinical exposure is experienced by us students, which helps a lot.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are decent with optimal lighting, air conditioners, and fans. Spacious cupboards are provided and each student gets their individual chair and table. The quality of mess food is also good with a variety in the menu available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good college for veterinarians in India and has really good clinical infrastructure and teachers.

content.Placements: The placement scenario at our college is just average. This year, 3–4 pass-out students from BVSC got placement in foreign countries like Australia, New Zealand and Mauritius. The placement depends more on the clinical knowledge of the student than on their CGPA. So overall, if you're good in clinics during your internship, you'll get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are very well-equipped and the hospital is also the main government animal hospital in Haryana, so cases from the nearby districts come regularly, so the students get a lot of practical exposure. The Nehru Library is also one of the best in the state and has a collection of over 40,000 books. The hostel facility is something that needs to be improved. The hostel buildings are very old but you can easily get PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc.and AH) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very good facilities.

content.Placements: Placing % depends on how you performed in your professional years. Every student has to do an internship program from the college in which the college or the government pays you every month for your expenses. The internship program in my college is the best in INDIA.
content.Infrastructure: In class, updated technology like projectors and TV screens are available for study purposes. Our college offers the biggest library in Asia. The quality of food is good and very affordable, with free medical facilities. There is one mandatory sports class every week.

nirf.description:
Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2025, Lala Lajpat Rai University of Veterinary and Animal Sciences fell 3 ranks to #37 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for veterinary education.
reviews.review_text: Good hostel facility, rooms are every day clean. Good to study, and greenery is everywhere, electricity service is good and one more thing meal is so healthy and hygiene. Drinking water is very clean in the hostel separate study room, a separate playground, and a good lawn.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 9 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission here if you want to live your life.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi and food of mess is also unhygienic. Students feel scarred in college hostel. Wardons are more than the worst. You can't go outside college capmus after 8:00pm. Security money is also not given returned and it is engulfed by college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 6 Jul 2022)
reviews.review_heading: A college for fulfilling your dreams.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but no Wi-Fi is there. Classrooms have Android screen and the library is good. Hostel’s food quality is good. Canteen has limited food variety. Limited sports and games facility is there. Medical facilities are not so good. Mess’s sitting arrangement is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 1 Jul 2022)

reviews.review_text: Clinics, Parasitology lab, physiology lab, pathology lab, microbiology lab, smart classrooms, and a centralised air-conditioned library are available. There are mess facilities in the hostel. Quality of food is good. Proper medical facilities are provided. Ground for volleyball, football, cricket, etc. are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 25 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good experience and the infrastructure and facilities of the college are okay.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The classroom conditions are good and also well provided with a smart board. Apart from the college building, there is another building for clinics in which you study the clinical subjects and attend the animal patients.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 21 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Good choice for your career.
reviews.review_text: The classroom is well-equipped with an android screen, well furnished, and has good lighting. The library is good with centrally air-conditioned labs are good with the latest tech and equipment. The hostel is good, mess provides good quality food, the canteen is also good. Sports and games are held in sports fest meet.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty members but lacks the exposure of a real veterinary college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fine. The laboratories have the proper equipment that is needed. But there is no ventilation in classes which makes situations worse during the summer season. Also, it offers libraries that lack books. The hostel is provided on the campus but it is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: College is the same as a boarding school. No transportation is available.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, no proper quality of food, no AC at classes, canteen have nothing to eat. Hard benches in class and lab have hard stools to sit. Labs lack equipment and classrooms environment are not suitable for studies. A small library is there but closed for months. AC rooms are available but at a very expensive price with poor quality food and no medical facilities and canteen have only tea and soft drinks. Lack of sports equipment and 2-3 games only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by International Institute of Veterinary Education and ResearchReviewed on 10 Jun 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent teachers, resources, good clinical cases but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well built for the accommodation of students, and provide enough space for the students to be comfortable. Laboratories are equipped with the necessary equipment required for teaching. The library is also good with various categories of books available. There is no provision of Wi-Fi for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Ideal Veterinary CollegeReviewed on 5 May 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It has poor management, hostel and facilities, and average teachers, but the fee is high.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are below average. Cold water is available for bath even in winters, and 8-9 students are adjusted in one room. There is no library, and the classrooms are average. There is no canteen, and the mess kitchen is small. Only a volleyball court is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good college for computer Science engineering.

review_content.Placements: From the 6th semester or after 3rd year, students are eligible for placement. Various companies visiting every year except covid period, like Gram power, Tech Mahindra, Bharat pay, Mindtree, etc. Are visit during the placement to recruit students direct from college campus. Average package offered 3 to 5 Lacs per annum or more.
review_content.Infrastructure: No, I have opted hostel because I am a local resident of this city. But my friends live in hostels and PGs. Their rent is approximately 5000 rupees per month. The PGs are nearby the college like dadabari, mahaveer Nagar and jawahar Nagar. Facilities like classrooms, labs and library are good as expected.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college to study with good environment and supportive teachers.

review_content.Placements: Those students who score 75% were placed. The highest salary package offered was 16 LPA, the average salary package offered was almost 3 LPA to 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was almost 1.5 LPA to 2 LPA. Recruitment companies were Mahindra, Tata, India Mart, etc. Those students who score 70% got internships in thermal and railway workshops.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library, labs, and classrooms were fine. The cultural activities were too good. Wi-Fi was too fast to download. The library was too good to learn everything. Almost every book related to this field are available and the labs were fine to learn the topic.

overview_faqs.question: Is Modi Institute of Technology (MIT, Kota) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Modi Institute of Technology (MIT, Kota) is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Modi Institute of Technology (MIT, Kota) has a rating of 2.95 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.87 on Campus Life, 2.58 on Placements, 2.88 on Faculty and 2.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Modi Institute of Technology (MIT, Kota) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Most affordable college in Kotak, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: So my branch has 50 students, while other branches have fewer students. There is no placement provided by the college; however, some students were placed last year through off-campus placements. There is no internship either; you have to arrange your internship on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in a remote location that is a little off-site from the main city; however, basic services are provided in that area. The college has a canteen, which is good but not good for enjoying free time. You can roam around the garden. The infrastructure of our college is not top-notch; it is below average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not a good college. But it is just good for a degree.

content.Placements: 10–15% of students were placed this year. The highest package was 15 lpa, and the lowest was 3–4 lpa, with an average of 6 lpa. TCS, Satyam, and Oracle were among the top recruiters. Almost everybody did an internship after their third year. Top roles like management, analyst, and developer were grabbed by students.
content.Infrastructure: The lab was of average quality, having an internet facility and requiring equipment according to course requirements. Classes are equipped with cameras. The library was not very good and did not have adequate electricity supply. Hostels are not so good but have basic needs and a laundry facility with a geyser and water cooler available. Food is average and eatable and campus has a canteen for students for all parties and fun. Medical facilities are not provided in college. Sports facilities are also not good and colleges do not engage in extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Good college for computer Science engineering.

content.Placements: From the 6th semester or after 3rd year, students are eligible for placement. Various companies visiting every year except covid period, like Gram power, Tech Mahindra, Bharat pay, Mindtree, etc. Are visit during the placement to recruit students direct from college campus. Average package offered 3 to 5 Lacs per annum or more.
content.Infrastructure: No, I have opted hostel because I am a local resident of this city. But my friends live in hostels and PGs. Their rent is approximately 5000 rupees per month. The PGs are nearby the college like dadabari, mahaveer Nagar and jawahar Nagar. Facilities like classrooms, labs and library are good as expected.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college to study with good environment and supportive teachers.

content.Placements: Those students who score 75% were placed. The highest salary package offered was 16 LPA, the average salary package offered was almost 3 LPA to 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was almost 1.5 LPA to 2 LPA. Recruitment companies were Mahindra, Tata, India Mart, etc. Those students who score 70% got internships in thermal and railway workshops.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, library, labs, and classrooms were fine. The cultural activities were too good. Wi-Fi was too fast to download. The library was too good to learn everything. Almost every book related to this field are available and the labs were fine to learn the topic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: You will experience pros and cons equally if you are admitting to the college.

content.Placements: There is not so good campus placement in the college. The average is between 3-4 lacs per annum. You can prefer off campus and start prepare for it from first year onwards. College is providing some online MOOC courses with certificate. For placements, don't rely on college if you are preparing for high package jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is very pleasing. The garden and classrooms are well maintained. The library of college has all the books you need for your course completion as you don't need to buy extra matter to study. There are sports facilities for sports like TT, badminton, basketball, football, etc.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are available. The hostel facilities and the quality of food are very good. reviews.review_heading: Modi Institute of Technology is a very good place to explore.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities, well-designed labs for practical and well-designed classrooms. Our college provides good Wi-Fi facility and hostel facility. Our college provides sports and many games for students. They also provide a good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good, and this college follows all the norms of government. Wi-Fi facility is available for 24x7, and classrooms are well-maintained. In the library, we can issue 4 books at a time for 1 month, and we can re-issue books. There is bus facility for college students. In the hostel, we get every basic requirement. Food quality is also very good, and medical facilities are available for 24x7. We get the best sports facilities. The hostel is located in the city, so w...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very good infrastructure. It has Wi-Fi enabled campus. Library is there for students. College also conducts various sports like cricket, volleyball, badminton, basketball, etc. At college level and at inter college tournament also. In college, I did not faced any issues.

reviews.review_heading: The best engineering college in the city.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by institute was good. There were good buildings, classrooms, library and sports ground. The classrooms are average, but the canteen and its food were best in the institution. There is neatness too in the rooms and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: MIT College is the the best college in Kotak.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very beautiful. There are 3 gardens, a big auditorium, a seminar hall, every type of lab, a big space for parking and a big canteen which offers all types of food. Bus service is available. The college has a big library.

reviews.review_heading: Best in Kotak but not that good as par with India.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is bad. The building is too old and it does't look good at all. However they are renewing the building but still it is not that good. Library is full of books from renowned publications. But you'll find only engineering related books. No other book can be found here related to literature or knowledge gathering. Labs are good, most of the PCs are in working condition and lab assistants are helping. This is the only college in Kotak that focus on practical learning.

admission_process.title: MJR College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MJR College of Engineering and Technology admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.MJR College of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include UG Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 72,000 - 1,60,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

courses_data.description: TheB.E. / B.TechatMJR College of Engineering and Technologyis a 3 - 4 years programme offered to the students in the field of Engineering. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in AP EAMCET, CBSE 12th, and BIEAP. Students can choose from 6 specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning among others. To complete the MJR College of Engineering and Technology admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 1,35,000 - 1,60,000.

courses_data.name: MJR College of Engineering and Technology UG Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Engineering can enroll in theMJR College of Engineering and Technology UG Diplomaprogramme, which lasts for 3 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the UG Diploma programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

courses_data.name: MJR College of Engineering and Technology After 10th Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MJR College of Engineering and Technologyoffers After 10th Diploma for 3 years at the After 10th level. The institute offers After 10th Diploma in specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Computer Science Engineering. Admission to After 10th Diploma programme is based on AP POLYCET scores of the aspirants. The total tuition fees for After 10th Diploma isINR 72,000. description: MJR College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available for admission to B.E. / B.Tech via the AP EAMCET exams. Students can scroll down this page to view the cutoff of various accepted exams for different courses, rounds and categories. A few more updates can be seen in the pointers below:

MJR College of Engineering and Technology AP EAMCET Cutoff 2025 has been published for all rounds and categories under both the All India and Home State quota. For the General category candidates belonging to the All India quota, the cutoff was 48901, wherein B.E. / B.Tech was the hardest course to get admission to for this category.

MJR College of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023 for various categories and rounds, can be found in this section. hostel_campus.college_name: MJR College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The size of the college is big, and the maintenance is medium.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my course and hostel is very nice. Food is available for the whole college timing. In the canteen, food is available at all times, but the cost is high. The food quality is medium, and the hostel is very bad to see. The infrastructure of my college is very nice to see, and the course infrastructure is well-maintained. Medical facilities are also available to treat.

reviews.review_heading: Good study, good faculty, good college.
reviews.review_text: My college faculty fully cares about students and my college infrastructure is very good. In my college, the library is also available for students and Wi-Fi is also available to watch classes online. My hostel food is good for students, and the hostel faculty treat students very well.

reviews.review_heading: There will be no study and no activities that will make you knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Basic infrastructure is provided, like a classroom. Labs are just to showcase and not used. Hostel can be skipped as nothing is available more than a room, and ness and canteen are not worthy. Medical facilities and sports are not provided. Overall, there are no such facilities that can be appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MJR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have excellent lab facilities, good classrooms, the best library, and great infrastructure. There are qualified teachers, and healthy food is served in the hostel. Overall, the quality of education is great, and every rupee is justified, and we can say the value for money is good and better.

reviews.review_heading: College gave me a new life and a very good job.
reviews.review_text:
There are around 2000 different books available in our college library. Classrooms and laboratories are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is not available in our college for students, though Ethernet is available in labs. The facilities in our hostel are not too good; you cannot get AC rooms or hot water. The food in the mess and canteen is hygienic. Medical facilities are not available.
Sports and games are available, but very few people play them.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure are very good. The Wi-Fi and labs are excellent. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The food quality is very good and we have a huge mess in our college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Iam fully satisfied with the facility .
reviews.review_text: The facilities that are available in our college are Wi-Fi, labs and a library. A special teacher is appointed to maintain them. The hostel gives good facilities like Wi-Fi and hot water for bathing.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the faculty, good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered by the department were very good. We have very good Wi-Fi, we have good classrooms and also we have a big library, we can find any books in that. The quality of the food is very good, the canteen was very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library facilities, and infrastructure are available in the course or department. The quality of food is better and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available. College is very good for the course. All facilities are also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in this college. Computers in laboratories are available, and other laboratory equipment is good. The students who are joining next year will have a good hostel facility, and it is under construction now. The atmosphere is safe in the girls' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MJR College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college. The drinking water and the canteen facilities are also good in nature. The nature around our college is very comforting. College buildings and the environment are always good. In addition, a library is available at our college. Since it is located near the village, so the village atmosphere is always good.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the good placements in our college.
reviews.review_text: We have the best computers with Windows 10. The Wi-Fi available in our college is super fast. We can get all our class notes and books from the library. The food quality in our college is better. They are conducting some sports programmes for students. The capacity of the mess is about 300–500 students.

reviews.review_heading: MJR College of Engineering and Technology is a good college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, transport facilities are available. Good quality facilities are available in our hostel. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are good. The facilities and infrastructure available for our course or department include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements and a good culture.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a good place for quality education. It's a pleasant area with a beautiful location. Good studies and good faculty for subjects. We have a good hostel for low-cost maintenance. There are proper Wi-Fi facilities and good infrastructure in labs; modern technologies are used in labs, which is very useful for students; there are good atmospheric classrooms and a hostel with good mess and good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good in this college. It has been a huge achievement for this college in a place like Pileru. The facilities were good. Even the hostel was also available with a lot of providing. But this college was a lack in Wi-Fi, and no allowance for using any electronic gadget by students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Guntur, offers UG and PG programmes across the streams of Engineering, Management, and Computer Application. Admission to all courses is based on merit obtained in the qualifying exam, along with valid entrance scores. Candidates must check the eligibility and fee as per their desired course on the official website before applying. KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Fee Structure varies from course to course. The common payable components for every course at the college are Tuition Fees, Security Deposit, Hostel Fee, etc. Find below the course-wise at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology:

faqs.answer: A:    KITS Akshar Institute of Technology accepts Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scores for admission to BTech courses. To be eligible for admission to BTech, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam. Further for MCA course admission is based on the APICET entrance exam score.
faqs.question: Do I need Andhra Pradesh EAMCET Score to get into KITS Akshar Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility and selection criteria for all the courses at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology differ from both UG and PG. Candidates who want to be admitted to any courses at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology have to appear for entrance exams accepted by the college for UG and PG courses. Given below the table contains eligibility and selection criteria for KITS Akshar Institute of Technology courses.BTech:Eligibility: Class 10 and Class with 45% aggregate from a recognised boardSelection: Andhra Pradesh EAMCETMCAEligibility: Graduation with 50% aggregate from a recognised boardSelection: APICET
faqs.question: What are the eligibility and selection criteria for all the courses at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    KITS Akshar Institute of Technology offers a two-year MSc course at the PG level. As per the minimum eligibility requirements of the course, candidates must pass a UG degree with a minimum 50% aggregate in the relevant discipline. Additionaly, candidates are required to apply and appear for APICET entrance exam for admission.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Guntur Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students got selected placements for the year of passing 2018-2022. The lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 8.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Wipro, TCA, Capgemini, Pilog, Slap, and NVH Koria. It is a good college for students who completed the intermediate to come to join because of new management, new strategies, and good placements offering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a good environment. Good food is served on campus. It has the best playing grounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to study for low-budget who want placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed in different companies. Students are trained in programming and English to get placed in jobs. Nearly every student who cleared all subjects gets placed. College helps every student to get jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories and library are good in this college. Wi-Fi and mobiles are allowed in our college. Classrooms are good, and ground is also good for sports. Hostels and college buses are available for students. The food served in the canteen is good and facilities are always good with students.

individual_reviews.title: A log on my college which helps the freshers to join and make joy.

content.Placements: 60 - 70 % of students will be placed during the drives conducted in the college. 2L is the lowest and 5L is the highest package offered to the students. HCL, Infosys, Google, and some others will be the recruiters who came to the college. Top roles are software builders, and testing jobs are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi will be nice when it is connected through the LAN adapters, the external Wi-Fi keeps on suffering. Labs will be done on schedule. Sanitized and clean rooms are provided. The hostelers will have good food, on-time good, the rooms are also very clean to stay in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college but the college rules are very strict.

content.Placements: 90 percentage students are placed. The highest package is 8 lpa, the lowest package is 2 lpa and average package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS and so many. May be 20 percent students got internship from CSE and the company they got internship is Wipro. Software developer, software Engineer, tester and so on are rolls offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good, all facilities are there in the lab and the infrastructure also very good. No phone allowed in college so there is no free Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are good with the infrastructure. Libraries are neither good nor bad. There are not many latest books in the library. Hostels are good but no security is there for our items. The quality of food is average. My college management conduct sports for an hour in every week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Guntur Engineering College.

content.Placements: About 95% of students got selected placements for the year of passing 2018-2022. The lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 8.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Wipro, TCA, Capgemini, Pilog, Slap, and NVH Koria. It is a good college for students who completed the intermediate to come to join because of new management, new strategies, and good placements offering.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good environment. Good food is served on campus. It has the best playing grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to study for low-budget who want placements.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed in different companies. Students are trained in programming and English to get placed in jobs. Nearly every student who cleared all subjects gets placed. College helps every student to get jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories and library are good in this college. Wi-Fi and mobiles are allowed in our college. Classrooms are good, and ground is also good for sports. Hostels and college buses are available for students. The food served in the canteen is good and facilities are always good with students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the faculty members, good placements, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college has good placements. Companies like TCS, Wipro, and top MNCs visit the college to hire students. Students should have 75% of attendance. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs, good classrooms, and a library. Mobile phones are not allowed in college. It has a good mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports. The hostel facility is good in the college.
content.Faculty: Our college has good faculty members. Faculty members are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They provide a very good explanation about all doubts. The study is helpful in the college. Semester exams are less difficult.

admission_overview.college_name: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Courses Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria & Dates

admission_overview.title: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission is entrance-based for its UG and PG courses. The college offers BTech and MCA courses at UG and PG levels. Admission to both courses is open. If candidates want admission to KITS Akshar Institute of Technology, they must fill out the application form by visiting the official websites of EAMCET and AIPCET for their respective courses. To know more about KITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission 2025, go through the following section:

eligibility_selection.title: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG courses, including BTech and MCA. KITS Akshar Institute of Technology offers one undergraduate course, including BTech. The duration of the course is four years. The college also offers MCA at the postgraduate level with a duration of two years. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college accepts AP EAMCET exam scores for admission to BTech and APICET exam scores for admission to MCA. Want to know other admission-related details about KITS Akshar Institute of Technology course eligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below: Course

Candidates who want to be admitted to any courses at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology have to appear for entrance exams accepted by the college for UG and PG courses. Given below the table contains eligibility and selection criteria for KITS Akshar Institute of Technology courses.BTech:Eligibility: Class 10 and Class with 45% aggregate from a recognised boardSelection: Andhra Pradesh EAMCETMCAEligibility: Graduation with 50% aggregate from a recognised boardSelection: APICET

admission_process.title: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission process contains various steps, including registration, selection, & fee payment for final seat confirmation. Admission is open for all courses. Given below are the step-by-details forKITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission process 2025:

1: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Application Process 2025Students must fill out the KITS Akshar Institute of Technology admission eligibility criteria & selection criteria for BTech & MCA courses. After that, Students are required to fill out the application form by visiting the official sites of EAMCET & APICET for admission.

2: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Selection RoundKITS Akshar Institute of Technology offers admission to Students forBTech & MCAbased onAP EAMCET, & APICET, respectively. Additionally, Students are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for admission.
3: Counselling Round

After filling out the selection criteria Students are required to apply & appear for counselling for their respective courses.3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official site. After Students get shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay the admission fee to lock in their seats.

faqs.question: Can we join BTech at KITS Akshar Institute of Technology directly?
faqs.answer: No, KITS Akshar Institute of Technology offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and apply for the EAMCET entrance exam for admission. After all the procedures the college releases its merit list. If candidates get selected in the merit list they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

Additionaly, to gain admission to BTech, candidates must have an45% aggregate in Class 10 and Class 12from a recognised board.

hostel_campus.college_name: KITS Akshar Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A log on my college which helps the freshers to join and make joy.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi will be nice when it is connected through the LAN adapters, the external Wi-Fi keeps on suffering. Labs will be done on schedule. Sanitized and clean rooms are provided. The hostelers will have good food, on-time good, the rooms are also very clean to stay in.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but the college rules are very strict.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, all facilities are there in the lab and the infrastructure also very good. No phone allowed in college so there is no free Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are good with the infrastructure. Libraries are neither good nor bad. There are not many latest books in the library. Hostels are good but no security is there for our items. The quality of food is average. My college management conduct sports for an hour in every week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guntur Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good environment. Good food is served on campus. It has the best playing grounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study for low-budget who want placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories and library are good in this college. Wi-Fi and mobiles are allowed in our college. Classrooms are good, and ground is also good for sports. Hostels and college buses are available for students. The food served in the canteen is good and facilities are always good with students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has labs, good classrooms, and a library. Mobile phones are not allowed in college. It has a good mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports. The hostel facility is good in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities. You will have the best experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college and labs are working properly. Classrooms are clean and comfortable. The library is good enough, and the facilities in our college and hostel are comfortable. The food served is tasty and healthy. Sports are conducted and a games period is given once a week.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very satisfying in learning.
reviews.review_text: There were 4 Mbps high-speed Wi-Fi, facilities were well developed, digital classrooms, peaceful, and all books were available 24X7. There was homely food, 4 students for every room, washing machine, indoor and outdoor games international type cricket ground, first aid kit for every room was available.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure, teachers, and laboratory technicians.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was available. Laboratories were very good, as compared to other colleges. In the library lot of volumes were available. The canteen was very good and it provide breakfast. The medical facilities were very good, because of our college opposite to hospital.

reviews.review_heading: I am not completely satisfied because of placements as well poor faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a better infrastructure compared to the hostel. The food served was not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because our college management has changed, so it would become good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is now changed because our management is changed recently. Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are available at any time, and classrooms are also neat and good looking. Food is good now after changing the management.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is very good, and it was well-organised. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility, which is useful for the hostel students. Labs were good. Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good and can be used very well. Food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Its an average and good campus for enjoyment and study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is good with well-equipped labs for all branches. Good and big library, almost every book will be available there, good ground for playing. There is ground for playing cricket, football, volleyball and Indoor stadium for Indoor games. The hostel is good and very clean but no Wi-Fi for hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guntur Engineering College (GEC, Guntur).
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide a proper ground and Wi-Fi facility. Labs are very bad. Hostel food is very bad, and management is not taking action on it. The library does not have recommended books, and they will charge money very high. There is no proper equipment in the laboratory.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members but needs better administration.
reviews.review_text:
1. Classrooms are spacious with good amenities for at least 60 students in each classroom. Library is also having a good collection of books for every department and almost each subject being taught. There was no Wi-Fi connection available for students till then. Labs for each department is good based on the curriculum requirements. 
2. Hostel is attached with the academic blocks itself on their top floors. Only few rooms are personal (that also consists min 6 members). Mostly big rooms are avai...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guntur Engineering College (GEC, Guntur).
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are many rules in our batch, and very strong people manage it. My best friend is studying well. Still, our college following strict rules, my friend has a very close bond with students and hostel in-charge. Our college provides canteen and hostel facility.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Overall seats across various courses at K.K.Wagh College of Food Technology goes up to 80. K.K.Wagh College of Food Technology offers a PG Degree course in Engineering. The course is available in Full Time mode.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at K.K.Wagh College of Food Technology for all courses combined?

review_content.Placements: There is a 10% chance of placements. The highest salary is around 25k, and the lowest salary is around 7k. The top recruiting company is Parle. The top role offered is executive manager. Placements are not good enough, and placement chances are low. Also, the salary is low.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not good enough and also not very supportive. The infrastructure is good. Labs, classrooms, and a library with Wi-Fi are provided on campus. Hostel facilities are available, but not on the college campus. Off-campus hostels are available. A canteen and gym are also present on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Food Science and Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied with placements of this college.

review_content.Placements: Students who score good marks in exams are eligible for placements. The average salary offered was Rs 15,000 per month. Many top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are excellent. Canteen is available. Playground is small. Mess is also available. There is a huge library. Several books and newspapers are available in the library.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are well-qualified, supportive, and experienced. The teaching quality is excellent. Semester exams are conducted strictly. No malpractices are allowed during exams. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure as well as facilities are provided by the college.

review_content.Placements: Companies like Nestlé, Parle, Britannia, ITC, and others recruit for this course, leading to better placements for students. Companies hire students with better packages, but students sometimes prefer master's degree program for better upcoming job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen provides a good ambiance and better food quality. The college classrooms are filled with Wi-Fi. The college has a library that provides e-book facilities for students, which is very beneficial for students to gain a wide amount of knowledge.

review_summary.college_name: K.K.Wagh College of Food Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities. Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: There is a 10% chance of placements. The highest salary is around 25k, and the lowest salary is around 7k. The top recruiting company is Parle. The top role offered is executive manager. Placements are not good enough, and placement chances are low. Also, the salary is low.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not good enough and also not very supportive. The infrastructure is good. Labs, classrooms, and a library with Wi-Fi are provided on campus. Hostel facilities are available, but not on the college campus. Off-campus hostels are available. A canteen and gym are also present on campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Food Science and Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with placements of this college.

content.Placements: Students who score good marks in exams are eligible for placements. The average salary offered was Rs 15,000 per month. Many top recruiting companies visit our college for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are excellent. Canteen is available. Playground is small. Mess is also available. There is a huge library. Several books and newspapers are available in the library.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are well-qualified, supportive, and experienced. The teaching quality is excellent. Semester exams are conducted strictly. No malpractices are allowed during exams. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure as well as facilities are provided by the college.

content.Placements: Companies like Nestlé, Parle, Britannia, ITC, and others recruit for this course, leading to better placements for students. Companies hire students with better packages, but students sometimes prefer master's degree program for better upcoming job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen provides a good ambiance and better food quality. The college classrooms are filled with Wi-Fi. The college has a library that provides e-book facilities for students, which is very beneficial for students to gain a wide amount of knowledge.
